title: RISC vs. CISC Architecture
summary: Compares CISC and RISC design philosophies, explains the practical observations that motivated RISC, and lists RISC advantages.
content_points: CISC: many complex, variable-length instructions; small register set; many memory addressing modes.
Observation: 20% of instructions used 80% of the time; complex instructions can be simulated.
RISC: fewer, simpler instructions; many registers; fixed instruction format; only load/store access memory.
RISC advantages: faster instructions, fewer memory accesses (if compiler is good), simpler decode (less stalls), smaller die area.
learning_objectives: List the defining characteristics of CISC and RISC
Explain the empirical observation that motivated RISC
Compare RISC and CISC performance trade-offs
